target_repository.name: coveragepy
target_repository.why: Official coverage.py codebase with pytest suite; running coverage on its own tests produces statement, branch, and path-proxy metrics natively

trigger_sequence.command: cd work/coveragepy && set PYTHONPATH=. && python -m coverage erase && python -m coverage run --branch -m pytest tests/test_version.py -o addopts= -q && python -m coverage json -o coverage_baseline.json
trigger_sequence.purpose: Baseline run for Coverage Delta metrics

trigger_sequence.command: cd work/coveragepy && set PYTHONPATH=. && python -m coverage erase && python -m coverage run --branch -m pytest tests/test_coverage.py -o addopts= -q
trigger_sequence.purpose: Current run with branch coverage enabled

trigger_sequence.command: cd work/coveragepy && python -m coverage json -o coverage.json
trigger_sequence.purpose: Emit current coverage JSON (required raw data)

trigger_sequence.command: python coverage_py_metrics.py --coverage-json work/coveragepy/coverage.json --baseline-json work/coveragepy/coverage_baseline.json --source work/coveragepy/coverage --repo-url https://github.com/nedbat/coveragepy --output-json reports/coveragepy_metrics.json
trigger_sequence.purpose: Derive all 29 sub-metrics from coverage JSON
